channel.title: Macos on gracecondition
channel.description: Recent content in Macos on gracecondition

item.title: DirtySlide - root on macOS from one missing bounds check
item.description: Unprivileged to root on macOS 26.5, no entitlements, Developer Mode off, through one unbounded loop in the dyld shared-cache slide walker. Fixed in macOS 26.5.2.
